reviews.comment:
En todas las estaciones de servicio YPF que cargue combustible,  desde Bs As, Córdoba, San Luis, San Rafael de Mendoza y regreso,  en todas la atencion fue excelente,  salvo en la de Pacheco, pésimo atención.

(Translated by Google)
At all the YPF service stations where I refueled, from Buenos Aires, Córdoba, San Luis, San Rafael de Mendoza and back, the service was excellent, except at the one in Pacheco, which was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHeDczSnp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada viaje a capital es el lugar de carga habitual, nada distinto , baños que se pueden utilizar, poder desayunar o comprar algo para continuar.

(Translated by Google)
Each trip to the capital is the usual loading place, nothing different, bathrooms that can be used, being able to have breakfast or buy something to continue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHeDdId3BnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA  esta en decadencia hace mucho, y desde mala atención hasta baños sucios podes encontrar en las estaciones de servicio, del ACA

(Translated by Google)
The ACA has been in decline for a long time, and you can find everything from poor service to dirty bathrooms at ACA service stations.

reviews.comment:
Servicio de Playeros impecable, baños perfecto, precios medios, le bajo 2 estrellas porque es la segunda vez que necesito pagar con la app de Ypf y de mercadopago y me dicen que no pueden hacen factura A cuando en otras Ypfs si lo hacen.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable beach service, perfect bathrooms, average prices. I'm giving it a 2-star rating because this is the second time I've needed to pay with the YPF app and Mercado Pago, and they tell me they can't issue an A invoice, even though other YPFs do.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcTlyUTJBRRAB
